segment_policy_doc.name: Item 1 — Business (segment overview)
segment_policy_doc.excerpt:
Item 1. Business

The Company operates through six geographic operating segments: Europe, Middle East & Africa; Latin America; North America; Asia Pacific; Global Ventures; and Bottling Investments.

Global Ventures includes Costa Limited, innocent Limited, and other emerging beverage brands. Bottling Investments includes the Company's majority-owned bottling operations.

The Company sells beverage concentrates and syrups, and in some cases finished beverages, to authorized bottling partners.

narrative_fx_doc.name: MD&A — Latin America net revenue growth
narrative_fx_doc.excerpt:
Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Latin America

Latin America segment net revenues increased 12% year-over-year, or increased 15% on a comparable currency neutral basis, driven by concentrate sales volume growth and favorable pricing.

Europe, Middle East & Africa segment net revenues increased 5% year-over-year.

section_registry.filing_label: Item 1 — six operating segments including Global Ventures
MD&A — Latin America reported vs currency-neutral growth

policy_notes.statement: Global Ventures is a reportable operating segment (Costa, innocent, and other emerging brands) and must be included in the segment net revenue reconciliation.
